digest.top_line: PBS proton vs IMRT post-mastectomy reconstruction: capsular contracture comparison reported, no effect size in source.
digest.tldr: Single breast study today: PBS proton vs IMRT capsular contracture risk in post-mastectomy reconstruction pts. No extractable effect sizes from available source. Thin meeting day for oncbrain signal.

sites.intro: Capsular contracture remains a key toxicity driver in post-mastectomy RT with implants; proton-vs-photon comparison is an active question.

studies.name: PBS Proton vs IMRT Capsular Contracture (Post-Mastectomy Reconstruction)
studies.tldr: PBS proton vs IMRT capsular contracture risk in post-mastectomy reconstruction: no effect size reported in source.
details: 🔍 Retrospective or prospective comparison of PBS proton therapy vs IMRT in post-mastectomy pts with implant-based reconstruction; primary question: differential capsular contracture risk
📊 No effect size, rates, HR, or p-value reported in source; abstract/full text not available in tweet metadata
💊 PBS (pencil beam scanning) proton vs IMRT (photon); post-mastectomy setting with reconstruction (implant-based assumed)
⚠️ Study design, N, follow-up duration, and primary endpoint definition not available from source tweet; IJROBP publication listed but no results extractable
🔗 Capsular contracture is a known toxicity driver in post-mastectomy RT with implants; prior photon data suggest 20-40% rates at 2yr depending on fractionation and timing of reconstruction

verdict.rationale: No results extractable from source; design (prospective vs retrospective), N, and primary endpoint unknown. Cannot classify.
verdict.audience: Post-mastectomy pts with implant-based reconstruction receiving adjuvant RT

open_questions: Does PBS proton reduce capsular contracture vs IMRT in implant reconstruction?
Is dosimetric advantage of proton clinically meaningful for implant outcomes?

papers.title: Does Pencil Beam Scanning Proton Therapy Impart a Higher Risk of Capsular Contracture when Compared with Intensity Modulated Photon Radiotherapy in the Post-Mastectomy Reconstruction Setting?
